characters.name: Aunt Rhoda
characters.description: Aunt RhodaBackground informationFirst episode"Fright at the Museum"Latest episode"Fright at the Museum"VoiceCheri OteriCharacter informationGenderFemaleHomeMuckledunkFriends and FamilyRelativesBunsen(nephew)Uncle Funkle(husband)Bunsen's Dad(brother or brother-in-law)Bunsen's Mom(sister or sister-in-law)Charlene (niece)Uncle Barry (brother or brother-in-law)Wilda(niece)AlliesMikey MunroeEnemiesAmanda Killman[Source] Aunt Rhodais a minor character ofBunsen Is a Beast. She first appeared in "Fright at the Museum", where she was waiting for Uncle Funkle in the Beastville Deli underground. Rhoda is a middle-aged beast with blue curly hair, bat wings for ears, yellow eyes, semicircle-shaped black glasses, pink lipstick for makeup, a magenta dress, and a light blue pearl necklace.

characters.name: Beast of Muckledunk Blog
characters.description: Thebeast of Muckledunk Blogonly horrifies people with his boring observations. Bunsen mentions him inUnhappy Camperswhen asked about the beast of Muckledunk Bog. He shows a picture of him eating a Denver omelette. He is a parody of modern culture food selfies.

characters.name: Bunsen Beast
characters.description: Bunsen BeastBackground informationFirst episode"Bunsen Is a Beast!"Latest episode"Beauty or the Beast"VoiceJeremy RowleyInspirationA beast from space.Character informationSpeciesBeast/MonsterGenderMaleFull nameBunsen BeastOther names"Beast," by Amanda"Buddy," by Mikey"New Student," by Mrs. Flap's Students"Looser," by Amanda"Brandon," by Sophie Sanders"Destructive Beast," by Amanda"Bunsen The Beast," by Bob, Ken, and Jerry the BeastAge11OccupationStudentGoalTo prove that beasts and humans can happily coexist.HomeMuckledunkLikesMikey (best friend)Ice CreamCupcakesBrowniesDonutsAmanda Killman(sometimes)DislikesFrozen YogurtTangelosBeetsThe Do-NotThunderThings going wrongPowers and abilitiesLimb MultiplicationStoring (and shooting) random objects out of his head spoutDetachable LimbsExtendable LimbsInhuman StrengthPrehensile tongue, tail, and hornsShape-shiftingSize-shiftingEcholocation (Possible)Mind ReadingCloningTime-TravelHypnosisSound ManipulationCommunicating with animalsFlightQuote"I love all humans, especially that one!"Physical InformationEyesYellowBodyBlue, Cyan, Teal, and WhiteFriends and FamilyRelativesBunsen's Dad(father)Bunsen's Mom(mother)Uncle Funkle(uncle)Aunt Rhoda(aunt)Charlene (cousin)Uncle Barry (uncle)Wilda(cousin)Bob(cousin)PetsBoodlesOwnerMikey MunroeAlliesMikey Munroe(best friend)Wolfie (best friend)Amanda Killman(sometimes)Cosmo CosmaDarcyTimmy TurnerDenzel CrockerOthersEnemiesAmanda Killman(sometimes)Denzel Crocker(formerly)The Do-NotLove interestsSally[Source]Bunsenis the titular main protagonist ofBunsen Is a Beast. He is a beast who is the first beast of a human school in real life. He is the best friend ofMikey, a human who helps him "fit in". "Buddy," by Mikey"New Student," by Mrs. Flap's Students"Looser," by Amanda"Brandon," by Sophie Sanders"Destructive Beast," by Amanda"Bunsen The Beast," by Bob, Ken, and Jerry the Beast Bunsen has a very friendly, kind-hearted personality, though some find his boundless energy and optimism to be annoying, most notablyAmanda Killman. He is also somewhat flighty and easily distracted, but always well-meaning, with a very strong moral center. Though he can be naïve, Bunsen is shown to be very witty and clever when he needs to be, and is capable of problem-solving on the spot and outsmarting his adversaries with little effort. Bunsen likes everyone he meets and always sees the good in people rather than the bad.

characters.name: Bunsen Beast
characters.description: Bunsen BeastBackground informationFirst episode"Bunsen Is a Beast!"Latest episode"Beauty or the Beast"VoiceJeremy RowleyInspirationA beast from space.Character informationSpeciesBeast/MonsterGenderMaleFull nameBunsen BeastOther names"Beast," by Amanda"Buddy," by Mikey"New Student," by Mrs. Flap's Students"Looser," by Amanda"Brandon," by Sophie Sanders"Destructive Beast," by Amanda"Bunsen The Beast," by Bob, Ken, and Jerry the BeastAge11OccupationStudentGoalTo prove that beasts and humans can happily coexist.HomeMuckledunkLikesMikey (best friend)Ice CreamCupcakesBrowniesDonutsAmanda Killman(sometimes)DislikesFrozen YogurtTangelosBeetsThe Do-NotThunderThings going wrongPowers and abilitiesLimb MultiplicationStoring (and shooting) random objects out of his head spoutDetachable LimbsExtendable LimbsInhuman StrengthPrehensile tongue, tail, and hornsShape-shiftingSize-shiftingEcholocation (Possible)Mind ReadingCloningTime-TravelHypnosisSound ManipulationCommunicating with animalsFlightQuote"I love all humans, especially that one!"Physical InformationEyesYellowBodyBlue, Cyan, Teal, and WhiteFriends and FamilyRelativesBunsen's Dad(father)Bunsen's Mom(mother)Uncle Funkle(uncle)Aunt Rhoda(aunt)Charlene (cousin)Uncle Barry (uncle)Wilda(cousin)Bob(cousin)PetsBoodlesOwnerMikey MunroeAlliesMikey Munroe(best friend)Wolfie (best friend)Amanda Killman(sometimes)Cosmo CosmaDarcyTimmy TurnerDenzel CrockerOthersEnemiesAmanda Killman(sometimes)Denzel Crocker(formerly)The Do-NotLove interestsSally[Source]Bunsenis the titular main protagonist ofBunsen Is a Beast. He is a beast who is the first beast of a human school in real life. He is the best friend ofMikey, a human who helps him "fit in". "Buddy," by Mikey"New Student," by Mrs. Flap's Students"Looser," by Amanda"Brandon," by Sophie Sanders"Destructive Beast," by Amanda"Bunsen The Beast," by Bob, Ken, and Jerry the Beast Bunsen has a very friendly, kind-hearted personality, though some find his boundless energy and optimism to be annoying, most notablyAmanda Killman. He is also somewhat flighty and easily distracted, but always well-meaning, with a very strong moral center. Though he can be naïve, Bunsen is shown to be very witty and clever when he needs to be, and is capable of problem-solving on the spot and outsmarting his adversaries with little effort. Bunsen likes everyone he meets and always sees the good in people rather than the bad.

characters.name: Keeper of the Cures
characters.description: Keeper of the CuresBackground informationFirst episode"Eyes on the Pies"Latest episode"Eyes on the Pies"VoiceDaniel RossCharacter informationGenderMaleOccupationDoctorHomeBeast WorldKeeper of the Cures' Office[Source] TheKeeper of the Curesis a beast doctor who prescribes many beast cures in Beast World, voiced byDaniel Ross. In "Eyes on the Pies", he handed out a few of the cures toBunsen, who is suffering from his hiccups but they didn't work. It turned out that he handed out the wrong cures becauseMikeysaid he needed glasses. He finally gave Bunsen the right cure, which stopped his hiccups. Greek: Βασίλης Μήλιος / Vasilis Milios
